codeReview.summary: All four round-4 blockers are now addressed. `/users/profile` with empty username deterministically redirects to home, profile API/UI now support extra profile fields with date-type formatting output, login throttling enforces observed server-side delays, and milestone tests assert elapsed delay timing for the 1s/2s/5s thresholds.

summary: PASS — `fix-scrutiny-user-management-r2` resolves all remaining blocking scrutiny findings for user-management round 4.
